page.title: Properties
page.description: Manage the property inventory from this section.

sectionDescriptions.services: Amenities and services available in the property.

identity.title: Identity
identity.hint: Visible in listings and search results.

propertyType.label: Property type
propertyType.hint: Select a single type for the property.
propertyType.error: Property types could not be loaded.

modality.label: Modality
modality.hint: Select a single modality for the listing.

services.title: Services
services.hint: Choose the amenities available in the property.

coverImage.hint: PNG or JPG, one main image.

locationMap.label: Map
locationMap.hint: Click or drag the marker to set the exact property location.
locationMap.selectionHint: We will use the user's current location when available; otherwise, the map starts in Mexico City.
locationMap.loadingLocation: Looking up the current location to place the property's starting point.

municipality.label: Municipality
municipality.searching: Searching for matches in more municipalities...

mediaUpload.hint: You can wire the real upload later.

isPublicAddress.label: Show public address
isPublicAddress.description: Expose the exact address in the listing.

modalitiesDescriptions.sale: List the property for sale only.
modalitiesDescriptions.rent: List the property for rent only.
modalitiesDescriptions.mixed: Allow the property to be offered for both sale and rent.

pricing.emptyStateDescription: The modality defines whether we will capture sale, rent, or both price types.
pricing.propertyTypeRequiredDescription: We need the property type to know which rent periods are available.
pricing.loadingDescription: We are fetching the allowed rent types for this property.
pricing.noPeriodsDescription: We could not find configured rent periods for the selected property type.
pricing.inputHint: Only the prices you actually fill in will be sent.
pricing.selectorHint: Click a row to choose which amount you want to edit.
pricing.registeredHint: Summary of the amounts captured so far for this property.
pricing.tableEmpty: You have not entered prices for this property yet.
pricing.salePreviewHint: This amount will be sent as the sale price if you keep a value in this tab.
pricing.rentPreviewHint: This amount will be sent only for this rent period if you leave a captured value.

services.selectedHint: Click an amenity to remove it from the property.
services.selectedEmpty: You have not selected amenities yet.
services.availableHint: Click an amenity to add it to the property.
services.availableEmpty: There are no more available amenities.

cancelDialog.title: Cancel registration
cancelDialog.body: If you leave now, you will lose the unsaved changes for this property.

states.empty: There are no properties to display.

deleteDialog.title: Delete property
deleteDialog.bodyWithoutTitle: This action will delete the property and it cannot be undone.
